runner: manual: make -C plugins/plugin-local-inference/native/verify metal-verify metal-verify-multiblock metal-verify-fused (synthetic fixtures, real Metal device); plus a real Gemma-architecture GGUF generation through the libllama Metal FA path on the same host.

results.metal-verify: PASS 8/8 (turbo3 / turbo4 / turbo3_tcq / qjl / polar + polar+QJL-residual + polar pre-Hadamard ×2), tol=1e-3, max_diff <= 7.629e-06
results.metal-verify-multiblock: PASS 8/8 across 1/2/4/8 blocks-per-workgroup (turbo3 / turbo4 / turbo3_tcq / qjl)
results.metal-verify-fused: PASS 1536/1536 fused-attention outputs across 2 cases (case0 n_heads=4 n_kv_heads=2 n_kv=96 causal; case1 n_heads=8 n_kv_heads=2 n_kv=80 causal), max_diff <= 9.537e-07 — NEW: resolves the prior 'fails by design (no metal_verify cases-array path yet)' item in PLATFORM_MATRIX; the fused QJL-K/TBQ-V flash-attention Metal kernel now verifies. The n_kv_heads=2 GQA/MQA shared-KV geometry is exactly Gemma 4's attention shape.

gemmaCutoverMetal.flashAttnHeadDim512Supported: CONFIRMED in ggml/src/ggml-metal/ggml-metal-device.m FLASH_ATTN_EXT support gate — the supported head-dim set is {112,128,192,256,320,512,576}. Gemma 4 E2B/E4B use head_dim_global=512 with FA as the KV lever (QJL/Polar KV kernels are dimensionally inapplicable per M6), so the cutover's Gemma-4 global-attention path is servable by the Metal FA kernel.
gemmaCutoverMetal.endToEndGeneration: PASS — a real Gemma-architecture GGUF (gemma-3-1b-it Q4_K_M, SWA + GQA, head_dim 256) loaded + generated coherent text on this Metal device with flash_attn auto -> enabled (Metal compiled kernel_flash_attn_ext_vec_f16_dk256_dv256). Output e.g. 'The capital of France is Paris.' / 'Here are three primary colors: Red, Yellow, Blue ...'. The exact gemma-4-E2B/E4B base (head_dim 512) is the unpublished elizaos/eliza-1 bundle; its FA path is covered by the head-dim-512 support confirmation above.

sourceOfTruth: The AGENTS.md §8 Metal kernel gate (metal-verify + -multiblock + -fused) is 40/40 PASS on a real Apple M4 Max Metal device, including the fused-attention cases-array path that was previously authored-pending. The Gemma-4 cutover's Metal requirement reduces to flash-attention at head_dim=512 (its global-attention dim) — confirmed in the Metal FA support gate — plus correct end-to-end generation of a Gemma-architecture model, demonstrated here through the libllama Metal FA path.
